creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Franco, thank you for your contribution. Please note that new port submissions are expected and recommended to be in the SHAR format. For more info please consult:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#porting-submitting

That said, maybe a committer would like to take it anyway.

Also please note the rather bold warning upstream that, imho, should be added to this port as well:

WARNING: THIS SOFTWARE IS PRE-ALPHA SOFTWARE. DO NOT ATTEMPT TO RUN IN PRODUCTION.
